_readme: Handpicked audio library. Drop files in public/sfx and public/music, then add an
entry here describing each one. The render/director step reads this so Claude can
place the RIGHT sound at the RIGHT moment (SFX on cuts/emphasis, music as a bed
ducked under the voice). 'tags' + 'use' guide the choice; 'file' is relative to public/.

sfx.use: an element or card popping in
